title: Supply Chain Knowledge Gap | Logistics Business Outlook

Containers miss vessel connections, rail shipments encounter delays, documentation errors hold freight at the border, and severe weather events disrupt schedules. Labor disputes, geopolitical conflicts, and unexpected market shifts can create additional challenges with little warning.
